hints.text: Dutch Caribbean, north of Venezuela (counts as Netherlands); unique **black car w/ a roof rack**; square **all-white** plates
One-storey **pastel bungalows** (metal roofs on shacks, tiled on nicer houses)
Road-sign **coloured borders (red/blue) wrap onto the back**; blue street signs on **yellow signposts**
**Black-and-white striped traffic-light posts** in towns; wooden poles w/ 3 alternating insulators
Dry green hills in the **west** (narrow roads, spread-out houses); **Willemstad** = Queen Juliana Bridge (yellow/blue guardrails); SE wind farm w/ rainy coverage
